title: Fourth Research School on Sustainable Solutions
description: The Fourth Research School continues the tradition of multi-disciplinary inquiry into sustainability. It focuses on viewing sustainability through holistic, integrative, and critical thinking, moving beyond traditional academic silos.
objectives: Equip participants with the skills to design, conduct, and write up research in sustainability science.
Expose participants to frontier research across the full spectrum of sustainability science
Stimulate multi-disciplinary dialogue and critical thinking on complex sustainability challenges.

schedule.event: Opening Keynote and Panel: Dynamic Sustainable Solutions for the Next Century / Welcome and Orientation
Thematic Lecture 1 / Identifying Research Themes & Forming Teams
Research Design Workshop: Problem Statement, Research Questions, Objectives, and Methods / Team-Based Proposal Development
Thematic Lecture 2 / Proposal Clinic with Mentor Feedback
Research Methods and Sources Workshop / Developing Research Frameworks and Work Plans
Thematic Lecture 3 / Guided Group Work on Research Projects
Stage 1 Progress Presentations: Research Question, Framework, and Method / Feedback and Discussion
Thematic Lecture 4 / Group Work on Analysis and Paper Sections
Academic Writing Workshop: Structure, Argument, Evidence, and Referencing / Drafting Key Sections of the Paper
Thematic Lecture 5 / Developing Results, Discussion, & Conclusion
Stage 2 Progress Presentations: Draft Findings and Paper Structure / Draft Paper Review and Peer Feedback
Revision and Paper Refinement Workshop / Revising Drafts and Strengthening Arguments
Independent Team Work and Mentor Consultations / Refining and Finalising Papers
Closing Symposium: Participant Research Presentations / Certificates and Closing Remarks

title: Third Research School on Sustainable Solutions
description: The Third Research School continues the tradition of multi-disciplinary inquiry into sustainability. It focuses on viewing sustainability through holistic, integrative, and critical thinking, moving beyond traditional academic silos.
objectives: Co-Author a research paper at the end of the school
Discuss, debate and research Sustainable Solutions in multi-disciplinary teams
Learn from researchers, faculty and industry leaders

schedule.event: Weekly Sessions from 10am-12 Noon EST

projects.description: An AI-powered system for optimizing waste collection routes in urban areas.
Developing biodegradable packaging materials from agricultural waste.

news.title: Hackathon Winners Announced
news.description: Congratulations to Team Green for winning the 2025 Sustainability Hackathon with their innovative waste management solution.

news.title: Upcoming Guest Lecture: Dr. Smith
news.description: Dr. Smith will be joining us to discuss the future of renewable energy.

title: Second Research School on Sustainable Solutions
description: Building on the success of the first year, the Second Research School emphasized the 'Dynamic' nature of sustainable solutions, integrating AI and systems thinking into the core curriculum.
objectives: Develop teamwork and interdisciplinary collaboration skills

schedule.event: Opening Workshop: Panel Discussion
Intro to Research & Topic Identification
Research Ethics & Proposal Preparation
Principles of Sustainability & Group Work
Systems Thinking & Progress Presentation
AI for Sustainability & Group Work
Final Workshop: Presentation of Final Papers

title: First Research School on Sustainable Solutions
description: The inaugural Research School established the foundation for our educational outreach, bringing together students and experts to explore the intersection of technology, consciousness, and sustainability.

schedule.event: Opening Workshop
Intro to Research Process
Research Ethics
Systems Thinking & Midterm Presentations
